heading: Existing technical assistance providers
label: 9604 Existing technical assistance providers
text: The Secretary shall continue awards for the support of the Eisenhower Regional Mathematics and Science Education Consortia established under part M of the Educational Research, Development, Dissemination, and Improvement Act of 1994 (as such part existed on the day before ), the Regional Technology in Education Consortia under section 3141 of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965 (as such section existed on the day before ), and the Comprehensive Regional Assistance Centers established under part K of the Educational Research, Development, Dissemination, and Improvement Act of 1994 (as such part existed on the day before ), in accordance with the terms of such awards, until the comprehensive centers authorized under are established.November 5, 2002January 8, 2002November 5, 2002section 9602 of this title
